## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Product safety

- [ ] Does not add cheats, automation, boosting, gambling, or credential storage.
- [ ] Separates verified facts from AI-generated interpretation.
- [ ] Handles stale patch/data states honestly.
